name: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company We are one of the largest publicly-traded lodging real estate investment trusts (REIT) with a diverse portfolio of iconic and market-leading hotels and resorts with significant underlying real estate value. As of February20, 2026, our portfolio consists of 34 premium-branded hotels and resorts with approximately 23,000 rooms, located in prime United States (U.S.) markets with high barriers to entry.
